message:
refactor(interactive): extract view(), submit_oauth_code(), and history navigation into submodules

Continue the interactive.rs decomposition with three targeted extractions:

1. view.rs: Move the main view() method (~195 lines) — the top-level
   TUI frame compositor that assembles header, conversation viewport,
   scroll indicator, tool status, input area, and footer — into the
   view submodule where all other rendering logic already lives. Also
   remove the now-unused clamp_to_terminal_height and
   normalize_raw_terminal_newlines re-exports from interactive.rs since
   they are only used within view.rs itself.

2. commands.rs: Move submit_oauth_code() (~90 lines) — the OAuth/API-key
   code submission handler that spawns an async credential exchange task
   — into the commands submodule. This keeps all authentication flow
   logic co-located with the other /login command helpers. The import
   header is simplified to `use super::*` since the method needs access
   to PiApp, PendingOAuth, and several msg/state types. Two functions
   (normalize_api_key_input, save_provider_credential) are narrowed to
   cfg(test) imports since they are only used in tests.

3. keybindings.rs: Add navigate_history_back(), navigate_history_forward(),
   and apply_history_selection() — input history cycling extracted from
   inline key handling to keep the history navigation logic isolated and
   testable.

Net reduction: ~400 lines from interactive.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
